_comment: CANONICAL medical triage thresholds — the single source of truth shared by the Dart app (on-device) and the Node backend (server guardrails). Owned by the OB-GYN specialist. Any change here must be accompanied by clinical sign-off. Both languages load/assert against THIS file; neither may hardcode a different value (enforced by the contract tests).

bpCalibration._comment: The widest cuff-vs-PPG disagreement still treated as sensor bias rather than a bad measurement. Beyond this a calibration is REFUSED, because storing it would shift every later reading — and a large negative offset can hide the hypertension this app exists to catch. Both the app and the server enforce these; the server has no UI in front of it.
